testcase.name: testAccountLockoutAfterFailedAttempts

failure.message: expected [Nalog je zaključan zbog više neuspešnih pokušaja.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Nalog je zaključan zbog više neuspešnih pokušaja.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.] at tests.LoginTest.testAccountLockoutAfterFailedAttempts(LoginTest.java:104) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 38 stack frames

testcase.name: testMaxPasswordLength

failure.message: expected [Password too long.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Password too long.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.] at tests.LoginTest.testMaxPasswordLength(LoginTest.java:81) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 38 stack frames
